title: The Importance of Archery in Islam: A Prophetic Sunnah of Strength, Skill, and Discipline
summary: Archery is a highly encouraged Sunnah in Islam, praised by the Prophet Muhammad ﷺ as a means of strength, discipline, and preparedness. Numerous authentic narrations highlight its value alongside riding and swimming. This blog explores the hadiths related to archery, its historical role in Islam, and its continued relevance as a physical and spiritual practice today.
